title: fragaria nilgerrensis var. nilgerrensis
intro: Fragaria nilgerrensis var. nilgerrensis, also known as the Nilgiri strawberry, is a type of wild strawberry native to the Western Ghats of India. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fragaria nilgerrensis var. nilgerrensis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into decoctions, infusions, or powders, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
